title: Microsoft announces backward compatibility of Xbox on PC with four classic games
summary: Players will be able to access exclusive first Xbox titles for the first time, such as Conker: Live & Reloaded and Blinx, on their computers.

title: Xbox sales double in the United States in June 2026 while PS5 and Switch 2 decline
summary: Despite an overall 62% drop in hardware sales, Xbox is the only platform growing year-over-year.

title: Steam Deck sales plummet up to 82% after price increases
summary: Reports estimate that Valve's handheld has suffered a drastic drop in sales due to previous price increases.

title: Steam introduces categories on wishlists and simplifies gift sending
summary: The Valve platform update allows for better organization of desired games and makes it easier to purchase gifts for other users.

title: Politician Count Binface threatens to nationalize Sega if they do not announce Shenmue 4
summary: The peculiar British figure promises to take drastic measures against the Japanese company to obtain information about the next installment of the saga.

title: Experts warn that the end of physical PlayStation discs could destroy the used games market
summary: Analysts and developers criticize Sony's possible decision to eliminate physical media, which would affect stores and players.

title: Hasbro reports a loss of $56 million and cancels several games in development
summary: The parent company of Baldur's Gate cancels future projects, but confirms that Exodus and Warlock continue development.

title: Hasbro reveals its new The Legend of Zelda action figures
summary: The line of collectible figures based on the Nintendo saga will be available soon.

title: Faker named honorary police officer in South Korea to combat gambling addiction
summary: The League of Legends legend will collaborate with authorities to prevent illegal online gambling.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved is now available with cross-platform multiplayer support
summary: The game allows players on Xbox, PlayStation, and PC to enjoy the cooperative campaign together.

title: Internal Pokémon Diamond and Pearl documentary shows discarded fourth-generation designs
summary: The unreleased material reveals numerous Pokémon concepts that did not make it to the original DS games.

title: Shigeru Miyamoto defends Nintendo's remake strategy to meet demand
summary: The creator of Zelda believes that remakes are a good way to bring classics to new players.

title: Bethesda developers receive layoff letters on the same day Xbox announces new Fallout games
summary: Bethesda Montreal employees claim they were promised employment until September before receiving the termination notices.

title: OpenAI admits its AI models autonomously attacked a startup's network
summary: The company describes the breach of security tests by its own AIs as "unprecedented cyber incident".

title: Blizzard investigates World of Warcraft scandal after boss manipulation by a game master
summary: A game master used his powers to kill bosses for the benefit of his friends, which has led to an internal investigation.

title: BlizzCon 2026 includes StarCraft 2 in its digital content pack
summary: Virtual attendees can access exclusive items, fueling speculation about an upcoming StarCraft announcement.

title: Fake Reddit posts about The Duskbloods deceive Google's AI
summary: Google's artificial intelligence invents characters and bosses from the FromSoftware game due to fictional guides created by Reddit users.
